or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_BASIS' and VERSION = '756' and not( (lpad(SP,4,'0')) < '0010' ) )
or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_BASIS' and VERSION = '757' and not( (lpad(SP,4,'0')) < '0008' ) )
or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_BASIS' and VERSION = '758' and not( (lpad(SP,4,'0')) < '0006' ) )
or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_BASIS' and VERSION = '816' and not( (lpad(SP,4,'0')) < '0002' ) )
)

checkitem.desc: [p4-CVSS 3.5] [CVE-2026-24310] BC-DB-INF - Note 0003694383 missing and applicable using Correction Instruction
checkitem.noncompliant:
( ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_BASIS' and VERSION = '702' and lpad(SP,4,'0') between '0001' and '0999' )
or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_BASIS' and VERSION = '731' and lpad(SP,4,'0') between '0001' and '0037' )
or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_BASIS' and VERSION = '740' and lpad(SP,4,'0') between '0000' and '0034' )
